title: pyrularia moschifera
intro: Pyrularia moschifera is a plant species belonging to the Bignonaceae family, commonly known as the muskroot or musk-root. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea. Pyrularia moschifera is said to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate cramps and spasms. Herbal preparations of Pyrularia moschifera include infusions, tinctures, and dried root forms, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
